comment.body:
this is vol smile. the IV across the chain. u can see top right she’s looking at Feb opex. ATM vol dropped compared to what the smile was pricing a week ago.. was 13.5%, now 12% → means fixed strike vol got sold off.
she called the vol smile drop, even though the setup originally suggested the opposite, but she broke down how the context shifted the outcome.. and she was spot on. IV got sold throughout the week, especially on Feb 6 when she first posted this.
comment.raw_body:

comment.body: in my opinion the situation was: 1) when Price went down below 6064 Vol UP-> Vanna shifted from Long to short -->MMs that were delta long they must sell spot. 2) Price reverting UP and passed 6064 zero vanna lvl -> Vanna shifted from short to long and MMs that were delta short they need to buy back the spot
comment.raw_body: in my opinion the situation was: 1) when Price went down below 6064 Vol UP-> Vanna shifted from Long to short -->MMs that were delta long they must sell spot. 2) Price reverting UP and passed 6064 zero vanna lvl -> Vanna shifted from short to long and MMs that were delta short they need to buy back the spot
